description: Default triager calibration for the three-state classification layer (三态分流层). Classifies FAILED evidence items into FAIL (confident violation) or NEEDS_REVIEW (borderline, needs human review).

source_credibility.description: Rule source trustworthiness. Higher weight because source quality is the strongest indicator of reliability.

extraction_quality.description: Quality of extraction method (manual > structured > llm > keyword_scan > conjecture_mine).

boundary_proximity.description: How close a numeric value is to the legal threshold. Highest weight for numeric_comparison rules — borderline values are the most common source of false positives.

matched_terms_strength.description: Specificity and count of matched terms. Few or generic matched terms indicate a weak signal.

belief_entropy.description: Entropy from belief propagation network. High entropy means contradictory evidence from neighbor rules.

severity_gate.description: Severity level gating. 'info' severity FAILED verdicts are less urgent and more likely to be false positives.
